steps.title: Identify the two curves
steps.content: The system consists of a linear equation (the straight line) and a nonlinear equation (the curved line). The solution to the system is the point where these two graphs intersect.

steps.title: Locate the intersection point graphically
steps.content: Tracing both curves on the coordinate plane, the straight line and the parabola meet at a single point. At this intersection, both equations are satisfied simultaneously.

steps.title: Read the coordinates from the graph
steps.content: At the intersection point, the $x$-coordinate is $2$ and the $y$-coordinate is $4$. Therefore, the solution to the system is $(2,4)$. That matches choice C.
